optimizations.title: Optimizations
optimizations.landingDescription: Tools to help you organize and clean up your financial data.

transfers.title: Transfer matching
transfers.description: Find expense-income pairs that might be transfers between your accounts and link them automatically.

transferSuggestions.description: Find transactions that should be linked as transfers between your accounts
transferSuggestions.selectExpense: Select a transaction to see suggestions

initial.title: Find transfer suggestions
initial.description: Scan your transactions to find income and expense pairs that should be linked as transfers between accounts

confirmLink.title: Link as transfer?
confirmLink.description: Both transactions will be linked as a transfer between accounts. This will correct your statistics and analytics by excluding them from income and expense totals.

skip.title: Skip this suggestion?
skip.description: This pair will be hidden from future scan results. The transactions themselves won't be changed.

notifications.scanError: Failed to scan for transfer suggestions
